brandDescription: Honda is a globally renowned Japanese automotive manufacturer known for its reliable, fuel-efficient, and technologically advanced vehicles. With a strong presence in the Indian market, Honda offers a range of sedans and SUVs including the Amaze, City, and Elevate, combining Japanese engineering excellence with modern design, spacious interiors, and impressive safety features.

models.name: Honda Amaze V
models.description: The Honda Amaze is a compact sedan that offers a perfect blend of style, performance, and practicality. Powered by a refined 1.2L i-VTEC petrol engine, the Amaze delivers impressive fuel efficiency and a smooth driving experience. With its spacious cabin, generous boot space, and advanced safety features, the Amaze is an ideal choice for urban commuters and small families.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Wireless Smartphone Connectivity (Android Auto, Apple CarPlay)

models.name: Honda City SV
models.description: The Honda City is a premium sedan that has been a benchmark in the Indian automotive industry for decades. With its elegant design, spacious cabin, and powerful 1.5L i-VTEC engine, the City delivers a refined driving experience. Packed with advanced safety features, modern technology, and Honda's legendary reliability, the City continues to be a preferred choice for sedan enthusiasts.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Wireless Smartphone Connectivity (Android Auto, Apple CarPlay)

models.name: Honda Elevate SV
models.description: The Honda Elevate is a stylish and modern SUV that combines bold design, spacious interiors, and advanced technology. Powered by a refined 1.5L i-VTEC engine, the Elevate delivers a smooth and responsive driving experience. With its commanding road presence, premium features, and Honda's legendary reliability, the Elevate is designed to elevate every journey.
